name: Minoni's Muse
description: Your intimate relationship and shared literary endeavors with Minoni have empowered your body and mind, increasing your Power by 3, your Intelligence by 2, your Allure by 1, and granting you 5% of a fight's Experience whenever you lose one (adversity breeds improvement)! However, your minotaur lover's sometimes surprisingly {i}assertive{/i} affections have made you more prone to enjoying being dominated by muscular women, increasing your Pain Sensitivity by 5% and lowering your ability to escape restraints by 10%.
